hero.title: From Congo to the World,
hero.subtitle: Since 2017, Congo Food Process turns Congolese natural resources into internationally recognized food products.

why_cfp.title: Why choose CFP?
why_cfp.subtitle: Four reasons to trust us
why_cfp.quality_desc: Rigorous control at every stage, from raw materials to finished product. Full traceability.
why_cfp.local_desc: Primarily sourced from Congolese producers. Every CFP product supports national agriculture.
why_cfp.innovation_desc: Ongoing R&D for new ranges adapted to both local and international markets.
why_cfp.export_desc: Products compliant with international standards, ready for North America and Africa.

products.title: Our flagship products
products.subtitle: Discover our ranges crafted with passion

process.title: Our transformation process
process.subtitle: From raw peanut to finished product — excellence at every step
process.step1_desc: Sourcing from certified local producers, quality control upon receipt.
process.step2_desc: Removal of impurities, calibration and selection of the best grains.
process.step3_desc: Roasting, grinding or coating depending on the range — 100% controlled processes.
process.step4_desc: Organoleptic, bacteriological and compliance tests before packaging.
process.step5_desc: Hygienic packaging, bilingual labelling, batch-by-batch traceability.
process.step6_desc: Local market delivery and international export according to orders.

b2b.title: Are you a distributor or importer?
b2b.subtitle: CFP offers export-ready packaging, flexible MOQs and full support for your distribution projects.

about.title: Our story
about.subtitle: A company born from the vision of valorising Congolese resources
about.history: Founded in 2017 by a team of Congolese agri-food entrepreneurs, Congo Food Process was born from a simple observation: Congo is rich in quality natural resources, particularly peanuts, that deserve local processing with high added value.
about.mission: Transform Congo's agricultural wealth into internationally-quality food products, create local employment and contribute to national food sovereignty.
about.factory_desc: Located in the Mpila industrial zone (SIASIC zone) in Brazzaville, our factory has a processing capacity of 800 kg of peanuts per day with modern equipment meeting food hygiene standards.

quality.title: Quality & Certifications
quality.subtitle: Rigorous standards at every step of production
quality.policy_desc: At CFP, quality is not an option — it is our foundation. Every batch is traced, controlled and validated before distribution.
quality.lab_desc: Microbiological analyses, organoleptic tests and physico-chemical checks at every stage of production.
quality.export_desc: Technical documentation available for international buyers: technical sheets, analysis certificates, nutritional balance sheets.

distribution.title: Distribution & Export
distribution.subtitle: From Congo to the world
distribution.national_desc: Present in supermarkets, neighbourhood shops and traditional markets in Brazzaville and Pointe-Noire.
distribution.export_desc: Export-ready packaging. Flexible Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ) depending on products.
distribution.partner_desc: Join our network of approved distributors and benefit from preferential conditions.
